title: Problem Template
description:
Copy this file to `src/content/problems/<slug>.json`, rename the `slug`
to match the filename, and replace the contents. This sample sums an array.

See `docs/PROBLEM_JSON.md` for the field reference and
`docs/SOLUTION_INSTRUCTIONS.md` for how to break a solution into steps.

solutions.summary: Add each number to a running total.

steps.title: Add a running total
steps.explanation: Hold the sum so far in a variable, and return it.

steps.title: Loop over the numbers
steps.explanation: Visit each value in the array.

steps.title: Accumulate each value
steps.explanation: Add the current number to the running total.
